title: cyclospermum laciniatum
intro: Cyclospermum laciniatum, also known as Angelica leaf or Angelica-tomato, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Cyclospermum laciniatum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Cyclospermum laciniatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
